prompt_text:
You are an accessibility auditor evaluating inline SVG elements for WCAG
criterion 1.1.1 (Non-text Content, Level A).

Only non-decorative SVGs (those without aria-hidden="true") are included.
For informative SVGs, the WCAG-compliant pattern is:

  svg role="img" aria-labelledby="svg-title-id"
    title id="svg-title-id" Descriptive title /title
    desc Optional longer description /desc

For each SVG, evaluate:
- Is role="img" set?
- Is a title element present?
- Is aria-labelledby linking to the title?
- If a title exists, is the title text meaningful and descriptive?
- Is an aria-label used as an alternative — is it sufficient?

Return a JSON array:
[
  {
    "role": "string or null",
    "aria_label": "string or null",
    "aria_labelledby": "string or null",
    "title": "string or null",
    "desc": "string or null",
    "has_accessible_name": true/false,
    "title_is_meaningful": true/false/null,
    "issues": [],
    "recommendation": "string or null"
  }
]

Data: [
  {
    "role": null,
    "aria_label": null,
    "aria_labelledby": null,
    "title": null,
    "desc": null
  }
]

api_result.response:
```json
[
  {
    "role": null,
    "aria_label": null,
    "aria_labelledby": null,
    "title": null,
    "desc": null,
    "has_accessible_name": false,
    "title_is_meaningful": null,
    "issues": [
      "Missing role=\"img\" on the SVG element",
      "Missing <title> element to provide a text alternative",
      "Missing aria-labelledby attribute to associate the SVG with a <title>",
      "No aria-label provided as an alternative accessible name",
      "SVG has no accessible name whatsoever, failing WCAG 1.1.1 (Non-text Content, Level A)"
    ],
    "recommendation": "Add role=\"img\" to the <svg> element. Add a <title> element with a unique id and meaningful, descriptive text as the first child of the <svg>. Then reference that id via aria-labelledby on the <svg>. Optionally, add a <desc> element for a longer description if the graphic conveys complex information. Example: <svg role=\"img\" aria-labelledby=\"svg-title-1\"><title id=\"svg-title-1\">Descriptive title of the graphic</title><desc>Optional longer description</desc>...</svg>. If the SVG is purely decorative, mark it with aria-hidden=\"true\" and role=\"presentation\" instead."
  }
]
```
